title: Create: Fallen Angels
description: This modpack is the one used by RoyalTarzan used in his create mod series.
body:
### **This is the client side of the modpack. If you want the server side, follow [this link](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ceate-fallen-angels-(server))**.

[![ModDex rating](https://moddex.gg/badges/projects/create_fallen_angels/rating.svg?style=social)](https://moddex.gg/modpack/create_fallen_angels)

## Main content:
This modpack is mostly the create mod and a lot of different addons with some QoL mods in there. The goal of the pack is to get the final item and build a machine that you activate with the item after that you get something but I wont spoil to much...




## Important notes:
Right now I can run it really stable with 8 GB of RAM and around 12 GB of VRAM ( visual RAM, depended on which GPU you have) at 160 fps.



## Content created with this pack:
RoyalTarzan (lead dev of the pack):
It starts in the first version of the pack but the server does get upgraded throughout the series.
